list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;A coming-of-age tale hinging on the character of Ava, a young woman of 14 who is attempting to
list.vod_content: A coming-of-age tale hinging on the character of Ava, a young woman of 14 who is attempting to find where she belongs in the world. She is "bedazzled" by the spotlight trained on her parents, a couple of DJs who have had their moment of glory. Now they are divorced, and Ava lives alone with her father. When her mum, Naomi, tries to make a comeback on the international DJing scene, Ava will discover a new world â€“ that of nightlife and clubs. But while her mother is in her element, things are more complicated for Ava, who will have to adapt if she wants to avoid losing her own identity.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Anatema is the third title of The Fear Collection after Veneciafrenia and Venus, by Jaume Bala
list.vod_content: Anatema is the third title of The Fear Collection after Veneciafrenia and Venus, by Jaume Balaguerأ³, with Ester Expأ³sito as the feisty protagonist. But this new release marks the debut of writer and screenwriter Jimina Sabadأ؛, as one of the objectives of this label, among others, is to open up opportunities for new directors in the fantasy genre to direct projects. According to the synopsis, Juana (played by Watling) is a nun with a strong character, marked by a paranormal experience. A mysterious assignment from the Archbishopric will lead her to an old church in old Madrid, built on a network of passages of unknown origin. She will soon discover that in the depths of the building there is something older than the legends that are told about that place... and the Evil that dwells there has begun to infect the outside.
